productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Solid Beige Trousers
description: Composition Beige full length trousers made of 100% cotton, has flat front with two insert pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with buttoned closures, plastic zipper and button closure, loops on the waist to secure a belt and extended hemlines that can be trimmed to suit the wearer's height Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold Wash dark colours separately using bleach without chlorine Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low and do not dry in sunlight Use medium heat, steam iron Do not iron on prints or embellishments Upgrade your sophisticated style with these beige trousers from Reid and Taylor. The pure cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day, while the classic cut of the trousers make it perfect for formal and semi-formal wear. Team these with slim fit shirts and leather oxfords for a well groomed look. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 44" Height-6.3& rdquo , Waist & ndash 32& rdquo
